title: CVE-2026-3644 - Incomplete control character validation in http.cookies

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3644 - Incomplete control character validation in h

            - '*http.cookies*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
